<!--
Please read CONTRIBUTING.md before opening this PR. All sections below are required
and must be written in English. PRs missing any of them will be closed without merging.
-->

## What does this change do?

## How does it do it?

## Why is it necessary?

<!-- What gap in accuracy/compatibility/performance/UX does this close? Link to docs/ROADMAP.md or docs/STATUS.md items if relevant. -->

## What was tested, and how?

<!-- Name the specific game(s) or test case(s) used, the observed behavior before, and after. If you could not actually run/test the change, say so explicitly instead of asserting it works. -->

## AI usage disclosure (required — state yes or no, not just when AI was used)

<!--
AI usage: yes/no — brief note.
Example (yes): "AI usage: yes — implementation drafted with Claude, tested locally by me (./gradlew test, all passing)."
Example (no):  "AI usage: no — written entirely by hand."
Partial AI help (e.g. only for review, docs, or debugging) still counts as "yes". See docs/AI_CONTRIBUTIONS.md.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] No dependency on a BIOS/firmware/original-console file was introduced.
- [ ] No OpenGL code or dependency was introduced (Vulkan only).
- [ ] No piracy-adjacent content (ROM/ISO links, copyrighted assets) was introduced.
- [ ] No monetization mechanism (ads, paywalls, telemetry sale, etc.) was introduced.
- [ ] `docs/STATUS.md` updated (including its "Last updated" date) if this change affects what's implemented or what's next.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated with a dated entry (including AI usage) if this change is worth recording.
- [ ] `docs/ROADMAP.md` updated if this change affects priorities or next steps.
- [ ] `docs/DEPENDENCIES.md` updated if this change adds, removes, or upgrades a dependency.
